# MarketAtlas

> Free financial rates dashboard — live gold, silver, platinum, copper, stock indices, fuel, and 150+ currency exchange rates, cached hourly.

MarketAtlas is a country-aware markets dashboard built by MAVIK group. Prices adapt to the selected country (India, USA, UK, EU, Japan, China, UAE) with local currency, units (g/kg, L/gal), and regional indices. Data sources include Frankfurter (ECB), gold-api.com, Yahoo Finance, and MetalpriceAPI, with automatic provider failover and hourly caching.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Live dashboard with precious metals, stock indices, top movers, fuel prices, and currency exchange rates for the selected country.
- [Gold Price History](/history/gold): Long-term gold price trends over 1, 5, and 10 years with annual highs, lows, and averages in USD per troy ounce.
